description: validateAndTransitionVault(...) was called from pipeline.ts and its return value was discarded. Because the helper is pure, the call had zero observable effect; deleting it would not change a single test outcome. Contradicted the step comment that called it an internal invariant check. Resolved in-place by removing the dead call from pipeline.ts; the helper remains exported and tested standalone in validate-and-transition.test.ts.

resolution.notes: Deleted the dead call and its import. Updated the step header comment to reflect that the pipeline does not reconstitute a Vault aggregate; loadVaultConfig does that next. REQ-008 still applies to the standalone helper.
